label: Material shortfall — insufficient stock to meet order requirement
Staging incomplete — components not fully staged for the order
Transfer requirement ageing — open TR not converted to TO within threshold
Transfer order unconfirmed — TO created but not confirmed by operator
Order not started — production has not commenced by scheduled start
Production behind plan — yield or completion significantly behind schedule
Quality hold — batch under quality inspection block
Inspection lot open — lot created but inspection not yet started
Usage decision missing — inspection completed but no UD recorded
MIC result missing — inspection characteristic result not recorded
MIC result failed — inspection characteristic outside specification
Outbound pick incomplete — delivery not fully picked before GI cutoff
Delivery past GI date — planned goods issue date passed without shipment
Previous order overrun — preceding order on same line running over
Schedule changed — order rescheduled within the planning horizon
Stale source — Silver replication lag exceeds critical threshold
Missing mapping — required reference or config mapping absent
